message:
test(decision): add no-mock integration tests for decision + policy gate modules

Add comprehensive test suite (20 tests, 1054 lines) covering:
- Expected loss calculations with real policy fixture
- Edge cases: single class certainty, invalid posteriors, disabled actions
- FDR selection: eBH vs eBY comparison, determinism, edge cases
- Alpha investing: persistence, wealth formula, wealth depletion
- Policy enforcer: protected patterns, rate limiting, robot mode gates,
  data loss gates, min age gate, warnings

Also update policy.json fixture with required fields:
- never_kill_ppid in guardrails
- max_blast_radius_mb and require_known_signature in robot_mode
- data_loss_gates section

Implements: process_triage-aii.7.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,18 +35,26 @@
   "guardrails": {
     "protected_patterns": [],
     "protected_users": ["root"],
+    "never_kill_ppid": [],
     "max_kills_per_run": 5,
     "min_process_age_seconds": 300,
     "require_confirmation": true
   },
   "robot_mode": {
     "enabled": false,
     "min_posterior": 0.95,
-    "max_kills": 3
+    "max_blast_radius_mb": 1000.0,
+    "max_kills": 3,
+    "require_known_signature": false
   },
   "fdr_control": {
     "enabled": true,
     "method": "bh",
     "alpha": 0.05
+  },
+  "data_loss_gates": {
+    "block_if_open_write_fds": true,
+    "block_if_locked_files": true,
+    "block_if_active_tty": true
   }
 }
